name: gift_item-10100008
detail_introduction: Once a kind of forbidden fruit, a business genius then realized its worth and quickly turned it into a hot kind of apples that have to be pre-ordered six months in advance.

name: gift_item-10200006
detail_introduction: A byproduct of Lord Satan's magic research. Drinking it will enhance a demon’s powers. However, since the user experience is so horrible, it is a commercial flop and becomes something he forces upon others as a gift.
